raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, I made a purchase at XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX, XXXX. The merchant first attempted to charge my CITI Mastercard ending in XXXX via XXXX XXXX, said the charge did not go through, and provided no receipt or confirmation. I then paid with my VISA, received a signed receipt, and the transaction was successful. Later, I discovered my XXXX was charged {$1300.00} without my authorization. I filed a dispute with CITI, provided all documentation and merchant correspondence, and the merchant admitted they charged both cards in error. Despite this, CITI failed to properly investigate and closed my dispute on XX/XX/year>, leaving me responsible for an unauthorized charge. I request reimbursement of {$1300.00} to my CITI Mastercard and that XXXX ensure the issuer ( CITI ) follows proper dispute resolution procedures to protect cardholders from unauthorized charges.
